title: Invalid timestamp format for Slack node
symptom: When using the Slack node to fetch channel history, an error 'invalid_ts_latest' is returned when passing a Unix timestamp.
applies_when: Using Slack node for channel history
not_this_if: Using HTTP node with correct timestamp format
root_cause: The Slack node expects a Date object or an ISO string for the Latest and Oldest parameters, while the user is providing a Unix timestamp, leading to the 'invalid_ts_latest' error.
fix_steps: Convert the Unix timestamp to a Date object using JavaScript.
Use the expression '{{ new Date(Math.ceil($json.ts) * 1000) }}' in the Latest field.
agent_instruction: Convert the Unix timestamp to a Date object for the Latest parameter in the Slack node.
